title: elcismia viscosa
intro: Elcismia viscosa, also known as sticky mallow or viscid mallow, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Elcismia viscosa include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Elcismia viscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
